goals: Store the fact that the user is a devoted fan of Noah Cyrus from Helsinki, Finland
Search for stored memories about music preferences and artist interests
View all stored memories to verify what has been saved
Remove an outdated or incorrect memory about preferences

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and expressive sixteen-year-old who loves sharing details about her favorite artist. Uses casual language and shows genuine interest in personalized interactions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows she wants the chatbot to remember things about her but does not understand technical details about memory systems or tool names. She simply wants a personalized experience as a Noah Cyrus fan.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored a preference, searched for it, viewed all memories, and cleaned up an unwanted memory. The task is complete when the user confirms their memories are properly managed.
